_comment: Paid-passage / special-transport links that are NOT simple walkable exits. Keyed by the departure room-id (string). Each entry describes one direction of travel; bidirectional transports appear under both room keys. See docs/passage-transports.md for the full narrative.

-89.cost: unknown (price not in MSG files; CNTVOY confirms a cost exists)
-89.note: BUY PASSAGE at Town 1 Docks crosses 'the great lake' by ship. NPC: ship's captain (SNAM13). White Rune required (NORUNE gate). Flavor: YOUVOY 'You buy passage across the great lake and board a ship...'. COMPLETELY ABSENT from ta-rooms.json exits — no directional exit connects -89 to -88 in the walk-exit table.

-88.note: Return passage from Town 2 Docks back to Town 1 Docks. OTHARR 'has just arrived on a ship from across the great lake' implies bidirectional service. Published-maps.md confirms 'connects back to Town 1 area via boat'. COMPLETELY ABSENT from ta-rooms.json exits.

-81.note: BUY PASSAGE ('b passage', 100 silvers) at the Town 2 path room enters Sewers Level 1. White Rune required (SB21: 'White Rune needed'). Return trip (room 844 UP to -81) is free — no BUY PASSAGE required going up. Currently in ta-rooms.json as a plain DOWN exit on room -81; the exit is MISLABELED (it represents paid passage, not a staircase).
